arts.ttl: PSG v Inter Milan LIVE: Champions League final lineups, updates and analysis
arts.sum: Follow all the action from Munich as PSG and Inter Milan meet in the Champions League final. It is the first-ever competitive meeting between the two sides, and there could not be more on the line.

arts.ttl: Champions League 2025 Prize: How much money will PSG or Inter Milan earn for being champions?
arts.sum: For the 2025 final, the total prize money is expected to reach approximately 250 million euros . The UEFA Champions League prize money is among the most lucrative in club football, with amounts increasing year on year.

arts.ttl: Inter Milan starting lineup against PSG in the Champions League final
arts.sum: Simone Inzaghi faced the press at 4:45 p.m., and the team’s final training session was at 5:30 p.m. Lautaro, speaking to TNT Sports UK, opened up about his injury issues during the semifinal against Barcelona : “After the second leg, I was wrecked.

arts.ttl: PSG starting lineup against Inter Milan in the Champions League final
arts.sum: Up front, Ligue 1 champion Dembélé will lead the line, while Kvaratskhelia, who missed last Saturday’s French Cup final with migraines, is back and expected to take his place on the left wing. Donnarumma – Achraf, Marquinhos, Pacho, Mendes – Fabián, Vitinha, Neves – Barcola, Dembélé, Kvaratskhelia .

arts.ttl: Five players who played for both PSG and Inter Milan
arts.sum: PSG and Inter Milan meet in the Champions League final tonight as two titans of European football compete for the trophy. There’s been plenty of talent to have worn both colours throughout the years, with no fewer than 12 players having represented PSG and Inter Milan.
